title: How to get a police certificate – Solomon Islands - Canada.ca
content:
## How to get a police certificate – Solomon Islands
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of the document you need
Police Clearance (also called criminal history check)

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for permanent residence in Canada.
You will also be requested to provide a police certificate to Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC) if you declared a criminal record on your application for an electronic travel authorization, work permit or study permit.
You should apply to the Royal Solomon Islands Police Headquarters (see Contact information for complete address).
Forensic Office Rove Police Headquarters P.O. Box G3, Honiara Solomon Islands
Phone from Solomon Islands 21686
Phone outside Solomon Islands +677 21686
